ddls:
CREATE TABLE "counties" (
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each county */,
  "county_name" TEXT /* Name of the county */,
  "county_code" INTEGER /* Code assigned to the county */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the county */,
  "area" REAL /* Total area of the county in square miles */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Average elevation of the county in feet */,
  "climate_zone" TEXT /* Climate zone of the county */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the county record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the county record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "irrigation_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data entry */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the county */,
  "total_irrigated_area" REAL /* Total irrigated area in acres */,
  "irrigated_area_under_th" REAL /* Irrigated area under threshold in acres */,
  "facility_withdrawal_mg" REAL /* Facility withdrawal in million gallons */,
  "ppt" REAL /* Precipitation in inches */,
  "irrigation" REAL /* Irrigation in inches */,
  "sm_f_unreported" REAL /* SM F unreported in million gallons */,
  "all_irrigation_mg" REAL /* All irrigation in million gallons */,
  "large_farm_unreported" REAL /* Large farm unreported in million gallons */,
  "c_irr_lg" REAL /* C irrigation large farm */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the data entry */,
  "month" INTEGER /* Month of the data entry */,
  "method_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the irrigation method */,
  "soil_type" TEXT /* Type of soil in the irrigation area */,
  "crop_type" TEXT /* Type of crop being irrigated */,
  "water_source" TEXT /* Source of water used for irrigation */,
  "efficiency" REAL /* Water efficiency of the irrigation method */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the data entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the data entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_irrigation_data_method_id FOREIGN KEY ("method_id") REFERENCES irrigation_methods ("method_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_irrigation_data_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., agency staff, county official, researcher) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data entry being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user's browser */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the access log entry was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES irrigation_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "county_officials" (
  "official_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each county official */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the county */,
  "official_name" TEXT /* Full name of the county official */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the county official */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the county official */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the county official */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the county official */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the county official record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the county official record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("official_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_county_officials_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "irrigation_methods" (
  "method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each irrigation method */,
  "method_name" TEXT /* Name of the irrigation method */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the irrigation method */,
  "efficiency_range" TEXT /* Range of water efficiency for the method */,
  "suitable_soil_types" TEXT /* Types of soil suitable for the method */,
  "suitable_crops" TEXT /* Types of crops suitable for the method */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the irrigation method record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the irrigation method record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "irrigation_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistic entry */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data entry */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  "metric_unit" TEXT /* Unit of the metric */,
  "metric_date" TEXT /* Date when the metric was recorded */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the metric */,
  "method_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the irrigation method */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the statistic entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the statistic entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_irrigation_statistics_method_id FOREIGN KEY ("method_id") REFERENCES irrigation_methods ("method_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_irrigation_statistics_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES irrigation_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "historical_data" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each historical data entry */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the county */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the data */,
  "total_irrigated_area" REAL /* Total irrigated area in acres */,
  "irrigated_area_under_th" REAL /* Irrigated area under threshold in acres */,
  "facility_withdrawal_mg" REAL /* Facility withdrawal in million gallons */,
  "ppt" REAL /* Precipitation in inches */,
  "irrigation" REAL /* Irrigation in inches */,
  "sm_f_unreported" REAL /* SM F unreported in million gallons */,
  "all_irrigation_mg" REAL /* All irrigation in million gallons */,
  "large_farm_unreported" REAL /* Large farm unreported in million gallons */,
  "c_irr_lg" REAL /* C irrigation large farm */,
  "method_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the irrigation method */,
  "soil_type" TEXT /* Type of soil in the irrigation area */,
  "crop_type" TEXT /* Type of crop being irrigated */,
  "water_source" TEXT /* Source of water used for irrigation */,
  "efficiency" REAL /* Water efficiency of the irrigation method */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the historical data entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the historical data entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_historical_data_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_historical_data_method_id FOREIGN KEY ("method_id") REFERENCES irrigation_methods ("method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regulations" (
  "regulation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each regulation */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the county */,
  "regulation_name" TEXT /* Name of the regulation */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the regulation */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Date when the regulation became effective */,
  "expiry_date" TEXT /* Date when the regulation expires */,
  "penalty" TEXT /* Penalties for non-compliance */,
  "enforcement_agency" TEXT /* Agency responsible for enforcing the regulation */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the regulation record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the regulation record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("regulation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_regulations_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "compliance_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each compliance report */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the county */,
  "regulation_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the regulation */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date of the report */,
  "compliance_status" TEXT /* Compliance status (e.g., compliant, non-compliant) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Additional comments or notes */,
  "audit_date" TEXT /* Date when the audit was conducted */,
  "auditor_name" TEXT /* Name of the auditor */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the compliance report was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the compliance report was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_compliance_reports_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_compliance_reports_regulation_id FOREIGN KEY ("regulation_id") REFERENCES regulations ("regulation_id")
)
